zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Anthony Hancock於1460年出生在英國英格蘭德比夏爾福洛福時，他的父親SIR Benjamin Hancock40歲，母親Joan Lawerence35歲。他於1474年與Lady Joan Holbach Eaglesfield在英國英格蘭德比夏爾斯特費爾德結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1518年在英國英格蘭德比夏爾斯特費爾德享年58歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Anthony Hancock于1460年出生在英国英格兰德比夏爾福洛福时，他的父亲SIR Benjamin Hancock40岁，母亲Joan Lawerence35岁。他于1474年与Lady Joan Holbach Eaglesfield在英国英格兰德比夏爾斯特費爾德结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1518年在英国英格兰德比夏爾斯特費爾德享年58岁。

nameMeanings.name: Hancock
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Hann + the hypocoristic suffix -cok, which was commonly added to personal names (see Cocke ).
Dutch: from Middle Dutch hanecoc ‘winkle, periwinkle’ (a type of shellfish), probably a metonymic occupational name for someone who gathered and sold shellfish.

History: Thomas Hancock, the uncle of Declaration of Independence signatory John Hancock (1736/7–93), was among the foremost of 18th-century American businessmen. He was a descendant of Nathaniel Hancock, who was known to have been in Cambridge, MA, as early as 1634. Born in Braintree, MA, John Hancock was president of the Second Continental Congress and the first governor of the state of MA.

variants.name: Hancox
meanings: English: variant of Hancock , with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s.

variants.name: Handcock
meanings: English: variant of Hancock with intrusive -d-.

variants.name: Hann
meanings: German and Dutch: from a shortened pet form of the personal name Johann (see John ).

English: from the Middle English personal name Hann, commonly a pet form of Henry (Middle English Hanry). Hann could also be a rhyming pet form of Randolph (Middle English Randal, shortened to Ran or Rand). Han was also a pet form of Joh(a)n in Middle Dutch, and it is possible that this usage was brought to England by Flemings after the Norman Conquest, but no evidence has yet been found that it was similarly used in Middle English. See Henry and Randall , and compare Hankin , Hancock , and Hanks .
English: variant of Ann with prosthetic H-.

nameMeanings.name: Anthony
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual English form of the old Roman family name Antonius, which is of uncertain (probably Etruscan) origin. The spelling with -th- (not normally reflected in the pronunciation) represents a learned but erroneous attempt to associate it with Greek anthos ‘flower’. In the post-classical period it was a common name, borne by various early saints, most notably a 3rd-century Egyptian hermit monk, who is regarded as the founder of Christian monasticism.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Anthony Hancock was born in 1460, in Foolow, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, SIR Benjamin Hancock, was 40 and his mother, Joan Lawerence, was 35. He married Lady Joan Holbach Eaglesfield in 1474, in Chesterfield, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He died in 1518, in Chesterfield, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 58.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Anthony Hancock est né en 1460, à Foolow, Derbyshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, SIR Benjamin Hancock, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Joan Lawerence, avait 35 ans. Il a épousé Lady Joan Holbach Eaglesfield en 1474, à Chesterfield, Derbyshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1518, à Chesterfield, Derbyshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 58 ans.

Er hat 1474 in Chesterfield, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom Lady Joan Holbach Eaglesfield geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1518 im Alter von 58 Jahren in Chesterfield, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Anthony Hancock è nato il nel 1460 nel Foolow, Derbyshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, SIR Benjamin Hancock, aveva 40 anni e il suo madre, Joan Lawerence, aveva 35 anni. Lui sposato Lady Joan Holbach Eaglesfield nel 1474, nel Chesterfield, Derbyshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1518, nel Chesterfield, Derbyshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 58 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Anthony Hancock(이)가 1460년 영국 잉글랜드 더비실르 푸로에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 SIR Benjamin Hancock(은)는 40세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan Lawerence(은)는 35세였다. 그는 1474년 영국 잉글랜드 더비실르 체스터필드에서 Lady Joan Holbach Eaglesfield(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1518년 영국 잉글랜드 더비실르 체스터필드에서 58세의 나이로 사망했다.

Ele casou-se com Lady Joan Holbach Eaglesfield em 1474, em Chesterfield, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Anthony Hancock родился в 1460 г. в местности фулоу, дирбишир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени SIR Benjamin Hancock было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan Lawerence, 35. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Joan Holbach Eaglesfield в 1474 г. в местности честирфиелд, дирбишир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1518 г. в местности честирфиелд, дирбишир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 58 лет.

Se casó con Lady Joan Holbach Eaglesfield en 1474, en Chesterfield, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija.
